titleStmt.title: SII 23.491: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 491. (A.R. No. 491 of 1907.) Kuttālam, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Uttaravēdīśvara temple—on the same wall Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 3: 1120-21 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription states that the introduction (tiruvāykkēḻvi) Pūmālai puṉaindu etc. has been taken as written before the king's name and date. The details of the date are given as Makara, ba. 7, Monday, Hastā which are however irregular. This registers a similar sale of one vēli of land as Maḍappuṟa-iṟaiyili by the sabhā of Bhūlōkamāṇikka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, here stated to be in Nallāṟṟūrnāḍu of Virudarāya-bhayaṅkara-vaḷanāḍu to the same temple of Śōnnavāraṟivār for 91 kāśu received from the temple, through one Dēvaṉ Tirutturutti-pichchaṉ a servant of the temple (Śripādam-tāṅguvāṉ). The assembly is stated to have met for this transaction in the courtyard of Aḻagiya-Maṇavāḷa-Āḻvār temple in their place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmālai puṉaiyntu poṉmālai tikaḻattā
mālai Eṉṟu tiruvāykkeḻvi Eḻuti tiripuvaṉaccakkara
vattikaḷ śrī vikkiramacoḻadevarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu ma
karanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu cattamiyum tiṅkaḷkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Atta
ttunāḷ virutarāyapayaṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu nallāṟṟūr nāṭṭu brahma teyam pūlo
kamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattu makāsapaiyom nammurt tiru
meṟkoyil Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷa Āḻvār koyil tirumuṟṟattil kūṭṭam
kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiiruntu tenkarai Irācanārāyaṇavaḷanāṭṭu tiruveḻu
ntūrnāṭṭu viṅkuṉir tirutturutti Uṭaiyār coṉṉavāraṟivār ko
yil Āticaṇṭeciratevarkku Iṟaiyiliyāka maṭappuṟañ ceytu kuṭukkai
ykku capayuḷḷiruntu paṇittār Irāyūrt toṇṭayapaṭṭaṉum Irā yūr cirāma
paṭṭaṉum Irāyūr kūttāṭipaṭṭaṉum coṭṭaic cirāmapaṭṭaṉum Araṇaippuṟattu ko
ṭampaṭṭaṉum paṇiyāl Inta Āticaṇṭeciratevarkku Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟañ ceytu kuṭu
tta nilamāvatu Inta pūlokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattu tiru varaṅkavatikku kiḻakku karu
kāvāykkālukku teṟku mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñcatirattu nilam veli Iṉṉilam velik
kum vaṭapāṟkellai karuṇākara vāykkālukku teṟkum kiḻpāṟ kellai kaṇṭiyūrvatikku meṟkum
teṉpāṟkellai catirattukku vaṭakkum meṟpāṟkellai kaṇṭiyūraṟp poṉṉapaka
ccatirattukku kiḻakkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉkellaiyuḷ Irāyūr cirāmapaṭṭaṉ pak
kal capaiyom vilaikoṇṭuṭaiyomāy Eṅkaḷutāyirunta ṉilam veli Iṉṉilam
veliyum Itil meṉokkiṉa maramum kiḻṉokkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappayum A
kappaṭa Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭukka Iṟaip poruḷukkum Akappaṭa
koṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟkācu toṇṇūṟṟoṉṟum Inta viṅkuṉirt tirutturutti Uṭaiyār
coṉṉavāraṟivār koyil cipātantāṅkuvāril tevaṉāṉa tirut turuttippiccaṉ kaivaḻiyāl
koṇṭu Iṉṉilam veliyum cantirāyittavaṟ Aṉupavikkakaṭavatākavum Iṉṉilattukkut
talaimaṭaiyāle nirpāyavum kaṭaimaṭaiyāle vāravum peṟakkaṭava tākavum Iṉ
ṉilattukkuc cilvari peruvari nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomākavum tiru vācal ponta kuṭim
aiyum nāṅkaḷe Iṟukkakaṭavomākavum Innilam veliyum cantirā yittavaṟ cācuvatika
māka Iṟaiyili yaṉupavikka coṉṉavāraṟivār koyilil kallilum cempilum veṭṭi koḷ
ḷak kaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Iṟaiyili maṭappuṟañ ceytu kuṭuttom makā capaiyuḷ
ḷiruntu paṇittār Irāyūrcirāmapaṭṭaṉum Irāyūr nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉum kuṇṭūr tiṭṭai Akkumāra
paṭṭaṉum Irāyūraruḷāḷa paṭṭaṉum Araṇaippuṟattu koṇṭayapaṭṭa ṉum vaṟṟalūr cak
karamāṭipaṭṭaṉum muppirāl puruṣottama paṭṭaṉum
Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kuṇṭur tiṭṭai Akkumāra paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi
kku Ivai Araṇaippuṟattu koṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Uṟuppuṭṭur vaṇṇa
(ṇa)yapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr Iḷaiya koṇṭayapaṭ ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai kiṭāmpuṟattu
puraṣottamapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr maṇavāḷapaṭ ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr kūttā
ṭipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyanārāyaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai vaṟṟalūr cakkaramāṭi paṭ
ṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cirāmapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūrk koṇṭaya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai pūlokamāṇikkac caruppetimaṅkalattu komapuṟa ttu puruṣot
tamapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai caṅkaranārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.491 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
